summaryEn: Newly released image of a USAF F-16 on an Iran strike mission, carrying WCMD dispensers, likely for air-dropped BLU-91/B anti-vehicle landmines. US forces have been dropping the mines around Iranian missile bases to destroy Iranian mobile launchers.
